entity: BBR source abbreviation PHO maps to warehouse canonical PHX (Phoenix Suns franchise, 1610612756)

query_target.sql: SELECT team_id, city, nickname, abbreviation, valid_from, valid_to, is_current FROM dim_team_era WHERE team_id = '1610612756' AND is_current

notes: PHO is the BBR source abbreviation used in scraped BBR roster pages for the Phoenix Suns; the warehouse canonical is PHX. dim_team_era.is_current=true is the post-1996 modern era row.
